summary: Complete testing of Chat, Notifications, and PayHere features for TopBass marketplace. Backend: 100% (18/18 tests passed). Frontend: All new features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/chat/send - Customer can send chat message
POST /api/chat/send - Handyman can send chat message
GET /api/chat/messages/{booking_id} - Returns messages with other_user and booking info
GET /api/chat/messages - Unauthorized user gets 403
POST /api/chat/send - Unauthorized user gets 403
GET /api/chat/conversations - Returns conversation list with unread counts
Chat on nonexistent booking returns 404
GET /api/notifications - Returns notifications with unread_count
Customer receives quote notification when handyman quotes
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read - Mark single notification as read
PUT /api/notifications/read-all - Mark all notifications as read
Chat message creates notification for recipient
POST /api/payments/payhere-checkout - Returns 503 when not configured (expected)
PayHere with nonexistent booking returns 404
Booking creation creates notification for handyman
Existing services endpoint works
Existing auth login works
Existing admin statistics works
UI: Navbar shows Chat link with MessageSquare icon
UI: Navbar shows notification bell with unread badge count
UI: Notification dropdown opens and shows notifications list
UI: Mark all read button works in notification dropdown
UI: Chat page shows conversations list or empty state
UI: Chat page (/chat/:bookingId) shows messages with proper styling
UI: Chat input and send button work correctly
UI: Message sent from UI appears in conversation
UI: Bookings page shows 'Quoted' filter tab
UI: Chat button appears on quoted/accepted/in_progress bookings
UI: Customer bookings show Pay Now button for quoted bookings
UI: Handyman bookings show Quote Price and Reject buttons for pending bookings
critical_code_review_comments: Register page missing data-testid attributes for form fields - should add for better test automation
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created with TEST_ prefix for chat flow tests. Bookings created between test customer and handyman with chat messages exchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat, Notifications, and PayHere features fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/chat/send, GET /api/chat/messages/{id}, GET /api/chat/conversations, GET /api/notifications, PUT /api/notifications/read-all, PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read, POST /api/payments/payhere-checkout. PayHere returns 503 (not configured) as expected - PAYHERE_MERCHANT_ID and PAYHERE_MERCHANT_SECRET are empty in .env. Chat is tied to bookings - only customer and handyman of a booking can access. Notifications auto-created on: booking create, quote, status change, chat message. Navbar polls notifications every 15 seconds.
payhere_status: NOT CONFIGURED - Returns 503 as expected. PAYHERE_MERCHANT_ID and PAYHERE_MERCHANT_SECRET are empty strings in backend/.env
